entryCriteria.formula: AND(CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__c && CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__r.ManagerId , OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 0 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 0 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor Bi Lingual Agents - Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 0 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor Level 4 - Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 2500 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Operation Head') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'FCA Manager') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ) ))

AND(CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__c && CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__r.ManagerId , OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 0 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 2500 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor Bi Lingual Agents - Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 2500 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor Level 4 - Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Operation Head') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ) ))

approvalStep.description: Assign to Manager of Manager of Manager

entryCriteria.formula: AND(CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__c && CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__r.ManagerId , OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 2500 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor Bi Lingual Agents - Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor Level 4 - Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ) ))

approvalStep.label: Level 3
approvalStep.name: Step_3

entryCriteria.formula: AND(CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__c && CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__r.ManagerId , OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor Bi Lingual Agents - Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ) ))

AND(CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__c && CreatedBy.ManagerId <> CC_FCA_Finance__r.ManagerId , OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ) ))

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor Bi Lingual Agents - Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Supervisor Level 4 - Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Operation Head') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'FCA Manager') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Senior Manager') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ))

ApprovalProcess.description: This approval process is made for the Canada region pertaining to Approvals created for anyone other than the owner. Details in CC-544.Added New Roles (Arbitration Coordinator and Top care specialist )as part of STRY0483222 story //STRY0563466 included story updations
ApprovalProcess.label: Canada Approval Process NonOwner New
